title: Bard Craft
description: This Mod let's you become a Bard in Minecraft and aid your Allies!
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This is a mod that adds Bard instruments to Minecraft, alongside some armor.

Instruments:
Guitar - For now can be used as a melee weapon, it's compatible with [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus).

Lyre, Flute, Drum, Guitar - Play music and summon an aura that gives buffs to allies.

Ocarina - Play music and summon an aura that gives buffs to allies, requires [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) to work.

Pan Flute, Triangle, Xylophone - Play music and summon an aura that gives buffs to allies, requires [Apothic Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes) to work.

Bard Armor - Gives you speed while you play an instrument.

Showcase:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IRy6vTp-zm8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Other instruments alongside different tiers will be implemented in the future.

 

If you want to get updates on the mod development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
